name: ASRock B760M PG Lightning WiFi Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Support DDR5-7200+(OC) - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 - 3x M.2 Socket3 - USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-C+A - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Dragon 2.5G LAN - 802.11ax WiFi 6E - Bluetooth 5.3
shortName: ASRock B760M PG Lightning WiFi Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA
description: Micro-ATX gaming motherboard for LGA 1700 with PCIe 5.0, DDR5 support, and WiFi 6E connectivity.
